qry:select.name: TASK_WF
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select W.c_wf, W.d_wf from wrk01_wf as W, wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_users as U join W.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf, I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread where I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and T.c_estado = \'WP\' and U.l_resolve=1 and U.oi_etty = {$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by W.c_wf, W.d_wf order by d_wf ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: TASK_CNT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(T.oi_thread) as cnt from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_users as U join WP.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf, I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread where I.c_estado_ej = \'R\' and T.c_estado = \'WP\' and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and U.l_resolve=1 and U.oi_etty = {$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: TASK_PAV
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(T.oi_thread) as pav from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_users as U join WP.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf, I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread where I.c_estado_ej = \'R\' and T.c_estado = \'WP\' and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and U.l_resolve=1 and U.oi_etty = {$CONSOLA/@ETTY} and T.f_vencimiento >= {Now()} and T.f_advertencia < {Now()} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: TASK_VEN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(T.oi_thread) as ven from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I, wrk02_threads as T, wrk02_users as U join WP.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf, I.oi_instance inner T.oi_instance, T.oi_thread inner U.oi_thread where I.c_estado_ej = \'R\' and T.c_estado = \'WP\' and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and U.l_resolve=1 and U.oi_etty = {$CONSOLA/@ETTY} and T.f_vencimiento < {Now()} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: LINKS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? ($CONSOLA/@DEBUG!='1') {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, \'N\' as modo from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_wf as WP, wrk01_process as PP, wrk01_roles_pro as RP, wrk05_organigramas as OG, wrk05_organigramas as OP, wrk05_estructura as EP, wrk05_entidad_estr as HP
where PP.oi_wf=WP.oi_wf and PP.oi_process=RP.oi_process and RP.l_iniciar=1 and OG.oi_organigrama = WP.oi_organigrama and OG.c_organigrama = OP.c_organigrama and OG.e_version_pub = OP.e_version and OG.l_automatica = 0 and OP.oi_organigrama = EP.oi_organigrama and EP.oi_estructura = HP.oi_estructura and HP.oi_entidad=\'{%= $CONSOLA/@ETTY %}\' and EP.c_role=RP.c_rol and WF.e_version_pub=WP.e_version and WF.c_wf=WP.c_wf and WF.l_automatica=0 and PP.oi_process not in (select T.oi_process from WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM as T)
order by modo DESC, d_wf ASC %} {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, \'N\' as modo from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_wf as WP, wrk01_process as PP, wrk01_roles_pro as RP, wrk05_organigramas as OG, wrk05_organigramas as OP, wrk05_estructura as EP, wrk05_entidad_estr as HP
where PP.oi_wf=WP.oi_wf and PP.oi_process=RP.oi_process and RP.l_iniciar=1 and OG.oi_organigrama = WP.oi_organigrama and OG.c_organigrama = OP.c_organigrama and OG.e_version_pub = OP.e_version and OG.l_automatica = 0 and OP.oi_organigrama = EP.oi_organigrama and EP.oi_estructura = HP.oi_estructura and HP.oi_entidad=\'{%= $CONSOLA/@ETTY %}\' and EP.c_role=RP.c_rol and WF.e_version_pub=WP.e_version and WF.c_wf=WP.c_wf and WF.l_automatica=0 and PP.oi_process not in (select T.oi_process from WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM as T)
UNION
select WF.oi_wf, WF.c_wf, WF.d_wf, \'D\' as modo from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_process as PP, wrk01_roles_pro as RP, wrk05_organigramas as OG, wrk05_organigramas as OP, wrk05_estructura as EP, wrk05_entidad_estr as HP
where PP.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and PP.oi_process=RP.oi_process and RP.l_iniciar=1 and OG.oi_organigrama = WF.oi_organigrama and OG.c_organigrama = OP.c_organigrama and OG.e_version_pub = OP.e_version and OG.l_automatica = 0 and OP.oi_organigrama = EP.oi_organigrama and EP.oi_estructura = HP.oi_estructura and HP.oi_entidad=\'{%= $CONSOLA/@ETTY %}\' and EP.c_role=RP.c_rol and WF.l_automatica=0 and PP.oi_process not in (select T.oi_process from WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM as T) %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: OWNER_WF
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, count(I.oi_instance) as cantidad from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and I.d_owner={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf order by d_wf asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: OWNER_CNT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as cnt from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and I.d_owner={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_PAV
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as pav from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and I.f_vencimiento >= {Now()} and I.f_advertencia < {Now()} and I.d_owner={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_VEN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as ven from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and I.f_vencimiento < {Now()} and I.d_owner={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_ERR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as err from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'E\' and I.d_owner={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: ADMIN_WF
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select W.c_wf, W.d_wf, count(I.oi_instance) as cantidad from wrk01_wf as W, wrk02_instances as I join W.oi_wf inner I.oi_wf where I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} group by W.c_wf, W.d_wf order by d_wf ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ADMIN_CNT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as cnt from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: ADMIN_PAV
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as pav from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and I.f_vencimiento >= {Now()} and I.f_advertencia < {Now()} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: ADMIN_VEN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as ven from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and I.f_vencimiento < {Now()} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: ADMIN_ERR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf as cod%} {% I.c_estado_wf as cod%} %} ,count(I.oi_instance) as err from wrk01_wf as WP, wrk02_instances as I where {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WP.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} I.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and WP.oi_wf=I.oi_wf and I.c_estado_ej=\'E\' group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WP.c_wf %} {% I.c_estado_wf %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: WF-ESTADOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
{%? ($CONSOLA/@DEBUG!='1') {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WF, wrk01_wf as WP
where WF.c_wf=WP.c_wf and WF.e_version_pub=WP.e_version and WF.l_automatica=0 and WP.c_wf = {$CONSOLA/@WF} %} {% select WP.oi_wf, WP.c_wf, WP.d_wf, WP.e_version, WP.e_version_pub, WP.l_automatica
from wrk01_wf as WP
where WP.l_automatica=0 and WP.c_wf = {$CONSOLA/@WF} %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: WF-ESTADOS-LIST
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select WE.c_estado, WE.d_estado, WE.c_color from wrk01_estados as WE where WE.oi_wf = {$SOURCE/@oi_wf}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: OWNER_CHILD_WF
OWNER_CHILD_CNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf as cod%} {% INS.d_owner as cod%} %} , count(INS.oi_instance) as cnt from wrk02_instances as INS, wrk01_wf as WF, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_O, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_P,
wrk05_estructura as EST, wrk05_estructura as EST_CC, wrk05_estr_estr as EST_C, wrk05_entidad_estr as PER where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and INS.c_estructura=EST_C.c_estructura and WF.oi_organigrama=ORG_O.oi_organigrama and PER.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.c_estructura=EST_CC.c_estructura and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST_CC.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.c_organigrama=ORG_O.c_organigrama and ORG_P.e_version=ORG_O.e_version_pub and ORG_O.l_automatica=0 and EST_C.e_deep>0 and INS.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WF.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} INS.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and PER.oi_entidad={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf %} {% INS.d_owner %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_CHILD_PAV
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf as cod%} {% INS.d_owner as cod%} %} , count(INS.oi_instance) as pav from wrk02_instances as INS, wrk01_wf as WF, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_O, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_P,
wrk05_estructura as EST, wrk05_estructura as EST_CC, wrk05_estr_estr as EST_C, wrk05_entidad_estr as PER where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and INS.c_estructura=EST_C.c_estructura and WF.oi_organigrama=ORG_O.oi_organigrama and PER.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.c_estructura=EST_CC.c_estructura and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST_CC.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.c_organigrama=ORG_O.c_organigrama and ORG_P.e_version=ORG_O.e_version_pub and ORG_O.l_automatica=0 and EST_C.e_deep>0 and INS.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and INS.f_vencimiento >= {Now()} and INS.f_advertencia < {Now()} and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WF.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} INS.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and PER.oi_entidad={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf %} {% INS.d_owner %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_CHILD_VEN
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf as cod%} {% INS.d_owner as cod%} %} , count(INS.oi_instance) as ven from wrk02_instances as INS, wrk01_wf as WF, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_O, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_P,
wrk05_estructura as EST, wrk05_estructura as EST_CC, wrk05_estr_estr as EST_C, wrk05_entidad_estr as PER where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and INS.c_estructura=EST_C.c_estructura and WF.oi_organigrama=ORG_O.oi_organigrama and PER.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.c_estructura=EST_CC.c_estructura and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST_CC.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.c_organigrama=ORG_O.c_organigrama and ORG_P.e_version=ORG_O.e_version_pub and ORG_O.l_automatica=0 and EST_C.e_deep>0 and INS.c_estado_ej=\'R\' and INS.f_vencimiento < {Now()} and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WF.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} INS.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and PER.oi_entidad={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf %} {% INS.d_owner %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: OWNER_CHILD_ERR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf as cod%} {% INS.d_owner as cod%} %} , count(INS.oi_instance) as err from wrk02_instances as INS, wrk01_wf as WF, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_O, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_P,
wrk05_estructura as EST, wrk05_estructura as EST_CC, wrk05_estr_estr as EST_C, wrk05_entidad_estr as PER where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and INS.c_estructura=EST_C.c_estructura and WF.oi_organigrama=ORG_O.oi_organigrama and PER.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.c_estructura=EST_CC.c_estructura and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST_CC.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.c_organigrama=ORG_O.c_organigrama and ORG_P.e_version=ORG_O.e_version_pub and ORG_O.l_automatica=0 and EST_C.e_deep>0 and INS.c_estado_ej=\'E\' and {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% %} {% WF.c_wf={$CONSOLA/@WF} and %} %} INS.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and PER.oi_entidad={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} group by {%? ($CONSOLA/@WF='') {% WF.c_wf %} {% INS.d_owner %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW, $i in $SOURCE/TASK JOIN $i/@cod inner $r/@cod

qry:select.name: WF_USERS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select INS.d_owner, INS.d_owner_ayn, WF.d_wf, count(INS.oi_instance) as cantidad from wrk02_instances as INS, wrk01_wf as WF, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_O, wrk05_organigramas as ORG_P,
wrk05_estructura as EST, wrk05_estructura as EST_CC, wrk05_estr_estr as EST_C, wrk05_entidad_estr as PER where INS.oi_wf=WF.oi_wf and INS.c_estructura=EST_C.c_estructura and WF.oi_organigrama=ORG_O.oi_organigrama and PER.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.oi_estructura=EST.oi_estructura and EST_C.c_estructura=EST_CC.c_estructura and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST_CC.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.oi_organigrama=EST.oi_organigrama and ORG_P.c_organigrama=ORG_O.c_organigrama and ORG_P.e_version=ORG_O.e_version_pub and ORG_O.l_automatica=0 and EST_C.e_deep>0 and INS.l_debug = {$CONSOLA/@debug} and PER.oi_entidad={$CONSOLA/@ETTY} and WF.c_wf = {$SOURCE/@WF} group by INS.d_owner, INS.d_owner_ayn, WF.d_wf order by d_owner_ayn ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

tr.td: No existen tareas pendientes de Resolucion...
No hay ninguna solicitud para iniciar...

xsl:value-of.select: concat('Resumen de Tareas Pendientes para el Workflow ',TASKS/@label,' (DEBUG)')
concat('Resumen de Tareas Pendientes para el Workflow ',TASKS/@label)
concat('Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas para el Workflow ',OWNER/@label,'(DEBUG)')
concat('Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas para el Workflow ',OWNER/@label)

xsl:if.xsl:if: Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas por los Dependientes(DEBUG)

xsl:value-of.select: concat('Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas para el Workflow ',OWNER_CHILD/@label,'(DEBUG)')

xsl:if.xsl:if: Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas por los Dependientes

xsl:value-of.select: concat('Resumen de Solicitudes Realizadas para el Workflow ',OWNER_CHILD/@label)
